prompt: Use the 'new-feature' preset workflow to set up for developing a new push notification feature.

assertions.name: recognizes_preset
assertions.description: Should recognize and load the 'new-feature' preset

assertions.name: includes_spec_phase
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include spec creation (A.1)

assertions.name: includes_branch_creation
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include branch creation (B.1)

assertions.name: includes_merge_step
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include merge to main (C.2)
